problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Perovskite crystal structure optimization — specifically Perovskite crystal structure — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
